Department of Tourism and Cultural Affairs, Government Decision No. Narrative 8226 / Pr. र.200
The Proposal: -
After India gained independence, the country faced the extremely painful tragedy of partition.
They had to leave, which had led to very difficult conditions in many parts of the country.
At a delicate and crucial time, India's first Minister of Industry and Commerce, Dr. Syama Prasad Mookerjee
He made immense sacrifices to preserve the unity and integrity of his nation. Dr. Syama Prasad
Mukherjee's martyrdom to honour his sacrifice and contribution to the cause of the nation.
To organize a Marathi play on the occasion of the day in Mumbai and the expenditure thereon, the aforesaid Reference No.
02 Administrative sanction was granted under the above Government Decision. Accordingly, the play
The issue of financial sanctioning of the organizing expenses was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
Marathi drama based on the life of Dr. Syama Prasad Mookerjee staged in Mumbai
Expenditure Rs 10,00,000 - (literal Rs.10 lakh only) to be financed under this Government Decision
Approval is being given.
